headline: S&P Global Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
summary: SPGI tops Q1 estimates with EPS & revenue growth of 13.7% & 10.4% y/y, respectively, driven by strength across Ratings, Indices & Market Intelligence segments.

raw.headline: S&P Global Q1 Earnings & Revenues Beat Estimates, Increase Y/Y
raw.summary: SPGI tops Q1 estimates with EPS & revenue growth of 13.7% & 10.4% y/y, respectively, driven by strength across Ratings, Indices & Market Intelligence segments.

headline: Waste Connections Stock Gains 3.2% Since Q1 Earnings Beat
summary: WCN beats Q1 earnings estimates as revenues rise 6.4% y/y. Gains in core waste segments offset recycling weakness and lift shares post-results.
